fields.field: {cimerant:type=field, default=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, fieldType=TIMESTAMP, nullable=false}
{cimerant:type=field, default=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE LOCALTIME, fieldType=TIMESTAMP, nullable=false}
{cimerant:type=field, default=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE LOCALTIMESTAMP, fieldType=TIMESTAMP, nullable=false}
{cimerant:type=field, default=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), fieldType=TIMESTAMP, nullable=false}
{cimerant:type=field, default=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE LOCALTIME(), fieldType=TIMESTAMP, nullable=false}
{cimerant:type=field, default=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE LOCALTIMESTAMP(), fieldType=TIMESTAMP, nullable=false}
{cimerant:type=field, default=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE NOW(), fieldType=TIMESTAMP, nullable=false}
{cimerant:type=field, default=NOW(6) ON UPDATE NOW(6), fieldType=TIMESTAMP, maxSize=6, nullable=false}
